title: retry prompt and implementation prompt alignment
goal: retry_instruction の fix_instructions と do_not_change を Claude 実装 prompt に確実に反映し、retry 品質を改善する
scope: retry prompt to implementation prompt alignment
constraints: must preserve existing retry count behavior
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: build_implementation_prompts and related retry prompt propagation only
backend/tests/*: retry prompt alignment coverage only
